title: Adwa Heat Wave
lead: Adwa is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Adwa has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 17%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 11.3 km/h. 
 The impact of this heat wave is expected to be significant, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately in Adwa.
